CommunityApplications.Profile: A Docker container combining qBittorrent with Private Internet Access (PIA) VPN, supporting both WireGuard and OpenVPN. Built on Alpine Linux for a minimal footprint. Fork of j4ym0/pia-qbittorrent with bug fixes and additional features including fixed WireGuard region selection, correct UID/GID handling for Unraid file ownership, configurable UMASK, IPv6 kill switch, and multi-arch (amd64 + arm64) support. Pair with the Windows 11 desktop app: https://github.com/GeorgeAL78/qbittorrent-desktop
